MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL
Off Calendar May-19-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Kelly and Jaffrey Clause, counsel for Plaintiff John Grotenhuis; Dale Allen and Kevin Allen, counsel for Defendant, Golden Gate Bridge Highway and Transportation District; Sabrina Strong, counsel for Defendant, Golden Gate Bridge Highway and Transportation District.

The Court references its written tentative ruling on the three motions: 1. for new trial - deny, 2. for special fee award - deny, and 3. to tax costs - deny except as to Item 12.

1. Ms. Strong and Mr. Kelly argue the motion for new trial, Ms. Strong arguing that there is case law to support a legal duty by the decedent to exercise continuing care when lawfully crossing in a crosswalk and clear evidence at trial to support negligence on the part of the decedent and an erroneous decision by the jury. Mr. Kelly notes the reasoning of the Court's tentative ruling and disputes the existence of "clear evidence" to overturn the jury verdict. The Court takes the matter under submission.

2. With respect to the Motion for special fees, Mr. Kelly submits to the tentative ruling.

3. Kevin Allen argues the Court's tentative ruling on the motion to tax costs which the Court takes under submission.
